reason:
Set 084 Session 3 — operator-attested close (--manual-verify), authorized 2026-07-07.

VERIFICATION PERFORMED (cross-provider, out-of-band of this close):
- Surface: `ai_router.verify_session` (Step 6), routed cross-provider.
- Authoritative verdict: VERIFIED (round 7).
- Verifier model: gemini-pro; verifier effective provider: google.
- Orchestrator effective provider: anthropic (claude-opus-4-8), EXCLUDED from
  verifier selection by F2 resolution.
- Template: the canonical session-verification adversarial template
  (`ai_router/prompt-templates/verification.md`).
- Raw artifacts: docs/session-sets/084-.../s3-verification-round-7.md (VERIFIED),
  corroborated by round 6 VERIFIED; earlier rounds 4-5 drove the genuine
  remediations (close-out.md --timeout drift, UAT dry-run->real refusal, UAT
  path placeholder, agents-tail Mode-B framing, activity-log s3.release key).
- Full ai_router pytest suite: 2734 passed, 5 skipped.

WHY THE ATTESTED PATH (the close backstop cannot cleanly settle this close):
The session's own verification/critique process-records (s3-issues*,
s3-verification*, path-aware-critique.json) are committed, so the close
backstop diffs them against the pre-session base and re-reads their pre-fix /
false-positive findings — the L-070-1 hall-of-mirrors at the close boundary.
Specifically: the path-aware-critique.json finding "--force skips the backstop"
is a HALLUCINATION, proven false by `ai_router/close_session.py:1762`
(`if not args.manual_verify and not no_router:` — no args.force term; comment
"every Full-tier close INCLUDING --force") and by
`test_force_path_also_gets_the_backstop` /
`test_force_close_with_blocking_backstop_verdict_is_refused`; the "--timeout
add_argument still present" finding is false (grep: no add_argument('--timeout')
in close_session.py — only the stale docstring was removed); the "UAT
unattested" finding is the operator process gate, which WAS exercised
out-of-band by a real GitHub Copilot orchestrator (the Hello-World / orch-test
walks) — that walk confirmed the F1/F2/F3 + backstop machinery end-to-end AND
found the Windows drive-letter path-case bug that is fixed in this very diff
(test_windows_path_case.py). The backstop has no --exclude for the session's own
committed artifacts (framework follow-up recorded in the disposition residuals).

The verdict that governs is the round-7 cross-provider VERIFIED; this attestation
bypasses only the automated evidence/backstop layer, on operator authorization.
